mapper.select: SELECT s.song_id AS song_id, s.title AS title, ar.name AS artist_name, al.title AS album_title, g.name AS genre_name, g.genre_id AS genre_id, al.cover_image_url AS cover_image_url, NVL(pl.play_count, 0) AS play_count, NVL(sl.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM songs_tbl s JOIN artists_tbl ar ON s.artist_id = ar.artist_id JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id JOIN genres_tbl g ON s.genre_id = g.genre_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM play_log_tbl GROUP BY song_id ) pl ON s.song_id = pl.song_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM song_likes_tbl GROUP BY song_id ) sl ON s.song_id = sl.song_id ORDER BY play_count DESC, song_id DESC

SELECT s.song_id AS song_id, s.title AS title, ar.name AS artist_name, al.title AS album_title, g.name AS genre_name, g.genre_id AS genre_id, al.cover_image_url AS cover_image_url, NVL(pl.play_count, 0) AS play_count, NVL(sl.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM songs_tbl s JOIN artists_tbl ar ON s.artist_id = ar.artist_id JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id JOIN genres_tbl g ON s.genre_id = g.genre_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM play_log_tbl GROUP BY song_id ) pl ON s.song_id = pl.song_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM song_likes_tbl GROUP BY song_id ) sl ON s.song_id = sl.song_id WHERE s.song_id = #{songId}

SELECT s.song_id AS song_id, s.title AS title, ar.name AS artist_name, al.title AS album_title, g.name AS genre_name, g.genre_id AS genre_id, al.cover_image_url AS cover_image_url, NVL(pl.play_count, 0) AS play_count, NVL(sl.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM songs_tbl s JOIN artists_tbl ar ON s.artist_id = ar.artist_id JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id JOIN genres_tbl g ON s.genre_id = g.genre_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM play_log_tbl GROUP BY song_id ) pl ON s.song_id = pl.song_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM song_likes_tbl GROUP BY song_id ) sl ON s.song_id = sl.song_id WHERE g.genre_id = #{genreId} AND s.song_id != #{songId} ORDER BY play_count DESC, song_id DESC

SELECT s.song_id AS song_id, s.title AS title, ar.name AS artist_name, al.title AS album_title, g.name AS genre_name, g.genre_id AS genre_id, al.cover_image_url AS cover_image_url, NVL(pl.play_count, 0) AS play_count, NVL(sl.like_count, 0) AS like_count FROM songs_tbl s JOIN artists_tbl ar ON s.artist_id = ar.artist_id JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id JOIN genres_tbl g ON s.genre_id = g.genre_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM play_log_tbl GROUP BY song_id ) pl ON s.song_id = pl.song_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM song_likes_tbl GROUP BY song_id ) sl ON s.song_id = sl.song_id WHERE s.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ar.name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY play_count DESC, song_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO play_log_tbl ( play_log_id, song_id, users_id, played_at ) VALUES ( play_log_seq.NEXTVAL, #{songId}, #{userId}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
